orchestrator_notes: Agents: Read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. This series fixes gaps from the 0870 audit. Key patterns: use TintedChip.vue and TintedBadge.vue (created in 0871a) instead of inline tinted markup. Use getAgentBadgeStyle() from @/utils/colorUtils instead of local functions. Use global .text-muted-a11y class instead of scoped *-text-muted classes. Pill-button style: border-radius 9999px, padding 8px 18px, active = rgba(255,195,0,0.12) bg + #ffc300 text, inactive = transparent + #8895a8 + smooth-border.

sessions.title: Shared Component Extraction
planned_tasks: Create TintedChip.vue (props: color, label, size, pill)
Create TintedBadge.vue (props: color, label, size)
Add getAgentBadgeStyle() to @/utils/colorUtils.js
Remove duplicate getAgentBadgeStyle from ~9 files, import from shared utility
Add global .text-muted-a11y class to main.scss
Refactor ~20 scoped *-text-muted classes to use global class
Add unit tests for TintedChip and TintedBadge
Run full test suite
tasks_completed: Created TintedChip.vue — props: color, label, size (sm|default), pill (default true). Renders span with rgba bg + bright text.
Created TintedBadge.vue — props: color, label, size (default 36). Square div 8px radius, proportional font sizing.
Added getAgentBadgeStyle(agentName) to colorUtils.js — returns {backgroundColor, color, borderRadius} using getAgentColor from agentColors.js
Removed duplicate getAgentBadgeStyle from 4 files: LaunchTab, JobsTab, AgentTableView, AgentJobModal. Import from shared utility.
Added global .text-muted-a11y class to main.scss with color: var(--text-muted) !important
Refactored 33 Vue files from scoped *-text-muted classes to global text-muted-a11y class
Fixed OAuthAuthorize.vue — v-icon was using CSS class as Vuetify color prop, changed to CSS class
Added 21 Vitest tests: TintedChip (7), TintedBadge (8), colorUtils (6 including getAgentBadgeStyle)
Updated McpIntegrationCard.spec.js test to match new class name
Full suite: 99 test files, 1914 tests — all pass
deviations: Spec estimated ~9 files with duplicate getAgentBadgeStyle; found 4 actual duplicates (LaunchTab, JobsTab, AgentTableView, AgentJobModal). Other files mentioned in spec (BroadcastPanel, MessageItem, AgentDetailsModal, ProjectReviewModal, TemplateManager) use hexToRgba inline for different purposes, not getAgentBadgeStyle.
Spec estimated ~20 scoped text-muted classes; found 33 across Vue files.
Found and fixed OAuthAuthorize.vue misusing CSS class name as Vuetify color prop (pre-existing bug, not introduced by refactor).
sessions.notes_for_next: All shared utilities are now in place. Subsequent sessions should: (1) use TintedChip.vue instead of inline tinted chip markup, (2) use TintedBadge.vue instead of inline tinted badge markup, (3) use getAgentBadgeStyle() from @/utils/colorUtils instead of local functions, (4) use class='text-muted-a11y' instead of scoped muted classes, (5) never add new scoped *-text-muted classes.
cascading_impacts: colorUtils.js now imports from agentColors.js — circular dependency is not an issue since agentColors has no imports from colorUtils
33 Vue files lost their scoped text-muted CSS class — the global .text-muted-a11y class in main.scss provides the styling
sessions.summary: Created TintedChip.vue and TintedBadge.vue shared components. Consolidated getAgentBadgeStyle into colorUtils.js (removed from 4 files). Added global .text-muted-a11y class and refactored 33 Vue files to use it. Added 21 unit tests. All 1914 tests pass. Commit: 8a54a815.

SystemSettings.vue — replaced v-btn-toggle with 5 pill-toggle buttons (Identity, Network, Database, Security, Prompts). Same pill styling.

ProjectTabs uses pill-btn class pattern (different naming from prior work). 0871c should decide whether to unify naming or leave as-is. The v-window / v-window-item content panels remain unchanged — only the selector UI was replaced. ProductForm.vue still uses v-btn-toggle (not in scope for 0871b).

bordered-tabs-content class removed from UserSettings and SystemSettings — replaced with pill-tabs-content

tasks_completed: ProjectTabs.vue — replaced v-btn-toggle with pill-button row (Staging with mdi-rocket-launch-outline, Implementation with mdi-code-braces). Tab pills use .pill-btn class with active/inactive states.

ProjectTabs.vue — replaced v-radio-group execution mode selector with pill-button pattern (.pill-sm variant). Supports disabled state when execution mode is locked. Direct click handler sets executionPlatform and calls handleExecutionModeChange.
MessagesView.vue — replaced v-tabs/v-tab with pill-button row (Message Timeline with mdi-timeline-text, Send Broadcast with mdi-bullhorn). Added scoped pill styles.
Updated bordered-tabs-content border-radius from '0 8px 8px 8px' to '8px' (pills don't visually connect to box like old btn-toggle did).

Updated global-tab-styles.spec.js — ProjectTabs tests now check for .pill-btn and .tab-pills instead of v-btn-toggle. Split consistency test to separate ProductForm (v-btn-toggle) from ProjectTabs (pill-btn).
All 1916 tests pass across 99 test files.
deviations: ProjectTabs had v-btn-toggle (not v-tabs as spec said) — functionally equivalent, replaced with pills either way.

Used .pill-btn class name (consistent with ProjectTabs pattern) rather than .pill-toggle (0871b's pattern for UserSettings/SystemSettings). Both patterns achieve identical visual result. Future session may unify naming.
sessions.notes_for_next: Pill-button class naming divergence: 0871b used .pill-toggle for UserSettings/SystemSettings, 0871c used .pill-btn for ProjectTabs/MessagesView. Both produce identical visual styling. A future pass could unify, but both are scoped styles so no functional conflict. ProductForm.vue still uses v-btn-toggle (not in scope for tab-to-pill conversion). The v-window/v-window-item content panels remain unchanged in both files.
cascading_impacts: global-tab-styles.spec.js updated — ProjectTabs tests now expect pill-btn class, not v-btn-toggle
ProjectTabs bordered-tabs-content has full 8px border-radius (was asymmetric 0 8px 8px 8px when tabs visually connected)
sessions.summary: Replaced v-btn-toggle with pill-button toggles in ProjectTabs.vue (Staging/Implementation + execution mode radio group restyled to pills) and v-tabs with pill buttons in MessagesView.vue (Timeline/Broadcast). Updated test assertions. All 1916 tests pass. Commits: b9456d91, 1bf0279b.

sessions.title: Smooth-Border Sweep & Card Polish
planned_tasks: grep for remaining variant=outlined across all .vue files
grep for CSS border: on rounded elements in scoped styles
Convert all found to smooth-border class + variant=flat
Key targets: Products cards, Admin Settings tab cards, dialog inner cards, integration card elements
tasks_completed: Grep sweep: found 144 total variant="outlined" across 37 Vue files. Of these, 5 were v-card (the target). Remaining 139 are form inputs (v-text-field, v-textarea, v-select, v-autocomplete, v-file-input), v-alert, v-btn, v-btn-toggle, v-chip — all legitimate uses.

CSS border sweep: found only 2 instances of 'border: Npx solid' in scoped styles — McpIntegration.vue high-contrast media query (accessibility, exempt) and AddTypeModal.vue color picker swatch (functional, exempt).
Converted ProductDetailsDialog.vue: 1 v-card outlined → flat + smooth-border (vision document cards)
Converted McpIntegration.vue: 4 v-card outlined → flat + smooth-border (email template card, JSON config card, 2 troubleshooting code cards)
Post-conversion: 0 v-card variant="outlined" remain. 139 total variant="outlined" remain (all legitimate non-card uses).
All 1916 tests pass across 99 test files.
deviations: Spec expected 5-10 files to change; only 2 files had v-card outlined (ProductDetailsDialog, McpIntegration). Products view product cards use no-variant v-card (already flat). Admin Settings tab content is rendered in v-window-item, not in outlined cards. Dialog inner cards were already flat or used smooth-border from prior 0870 work.
No CSS border issues found on rounded card elements — only high-contrast accessibility border (exempt) and color picker swatch (exempt).
sessions.notes_for_next: All v-card outlined instances are now eliminated. Remaining variant="outlined" (139 instances) are exclusively on form inputs, alerts, buttons, and chips — these are standard Vuetify patterns, not card borders. The 5 v-chip variant="outlined" instances (TasksView, AgentTipsDialog, AgentMissionEditModal) could be addressed in 0871f/0871g if desired. McpIntegration.vue uses bg-grey-lighten-4 on the email template card — may look odd in dark theme, worth checking visually.
cascading_impacts: ProductDetailsDialog.vue vision document cards now use smooth-border inset box-shadow instead of Vuetify outlined border
McpIntegration.vue inner content cards now use smooth-border — affects email template, JSON config, and troubleshooting sections
sessions.summary: Converted all 5 remaining v-card variant="outlined" to variant="flat" + smooth-border class across 2 files (ProductDetailsDialog, McpIntegration). Before: 5 v-card outlined, 144 total outlined. After: 0 v-card outlined, 139 total outlined (all legitimate non-card uses). All 1916 tests pass. Commit: 1a0550d2.

sessions.title: Design System Sample v2 Comprehensive Rewrite
planned_tasks: Comprehensive rewrite of design-system-sample-v2.html

Must cover: all colors with WCAG, tinted badges, tinted chips, pill buttons, buttons, inputs, stat pills, smooth-border, elevations, typography, nav icons, table patterns, card patterns, status chips, brand, accessibility
Keep v1 as historical reference
Update doc references
tasks_completed: Comprehensive rewrite of design-system-sample-v2.html with 16 sections (up from 11).
Section 1: Color palette with WCAG AA contrast ratios for all text colors, agent colors, status colors, brand colors, and border colors on bg-raised (#182739).
Section 2: Tinted badge grid — all 6 agents with 44px and 28px (small) variants, plus deprecated solid style reference.
Section 3: Tinted chip showcase — status chips, priority chips (with icons), category chips, staged chips (square variant).
Section 4: Pill-button toggle demo — settings-style (6 pills with icons), jobs-style (compact), messages-style, execution mode pills (small variant).
Section 5: Button styles — primary yellow, secondary outline, danger, icon-only, pill (tinted export/action).
Section 6: Input styles — default, focused with yellow ring, search with icon prefix.
Section 7: Stat pill + micro-bar demo — 3 dashboard cards (status distribution, agent roles, taxonomy).
Section 8: Smooth-border demo — 3 variants (default 1px, 2px emphasis, accent yellow) plus custom color via CSS variable.
Section 9: Surface elevation layers — 4-tier nested demo (flat, raised, elevated, overlay) with smooth-border values.
Section 10: Typography scale — Outfit headings (700/600), Roboto body (600/500/400), IBM Plex Mono data (400/600) with all sizes.
Section 11: Nav icon alignment — MDI vs Giljo SVG in inactive (#8f97b7) and active (#ffc300) states.
Section 12: Table row patterns — headers (uppercase muted), data rows with agent badges, hover effect, monospace data, pagination controls.
Section 13: Card patterns — standard smooth-border card, hover lift card, elevated card, empty slot (dashed border exception).
Section 14: Status chip showcase — all 5 project statuses with color codes, all 7 agent statuses with descriptions.
Section 15: Brand section — logo mark SVG, brand yellow, gradient, danger, tagline, gradient bar.

Section 16: Accessibility section — prohibited patterns (text-medium-emphasis, old hex values, CSS borders on cards, v-tabs, round badges) and required patterns (text-muted-a11y, CSS variables, shared utilities, components, touch targets).
Added table of contents with anchor links to all 16 sections.
Cleaned up deleted frontend/design-system-sample.html (old unversioned file).
Kept frontend/design-system-sample-v1.html as historical reference.
deviations: Old unversioned design-system-sample.html was already deleted (git tracked deletion from prior session). Included in this commit for cleanup.
No doc reference updates needed — no other docs reference the design system sample path directly.
cascading_impacts: design-system-sample-v2.html is now the definitive design reference with 16 comprehensive sections covering every pattern used in the application.
sessions.summary: Comprehensive rewrite of design-system-sample-v2.html from 11 sections to 16 sections. Added: tinted chip showcase (priority/category/staged), table row patterns (headers/hover/pagination), card patterns (standard/hover-lift/elevated/empty-slot), comprehensive status chip showcase (project + agent), accessibility section (prohibited + required patterns with contrast summary), and table of contents. All existing sections enhanced with more detail. Commit: 2a1a1224.

chain_summary: The 0871 chain (Design System Remediation & Polish) completed all 8 sessions across 2026-03-31. Starting from audit findings after the 0870 chain, this series: (1) created shared TintedChip and TintedBadge components, consolidated getAgentBadgeStyle into colorUtils.js, added global text-muted-a11y class refactoring 33 Vue files [0871a]; (2-3) converted all v-tabs and v-btn-toggle to pill-button toggles across UserSettings, SystemSettings, ProjectTabs, MessagesView, BroadcastPanel, and AgentJobModal — zero v-tabs remain in the codebase [0871b-c]; (4) verified home page polish was already complete from 0870 [0871d]; (5) eliminated all v-card variant=outlined (5 instances across 2 files) [0871e]; (6) restyled export buttons and CONFIGURATOR to pill-button pattern [0871f]; (7) converted ProductSelector chips and last v-tabs in BroadcastPanel/AgentJobModal to pill-buttons [0871g]; (8) rewrote design-system-sample-v2.html as definitive 16-section reference [0871h]. Net result: 1916 tests passing, zero v-tabs, zero v-card outlined, all agent badges tinted-square, all muted text using global a11y class, comprehensive design system documentation.
